hooks.command: ARGS="$TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$ARGS" | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+push\s+-f|git\s+reset\s+--hard|--no-verify'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive command. Use feature branches and safe operations.' >&2; exit 1; fi
ARGS="$TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$ARGS" | grep -qE '\.env|credentials|secret|\.pem|\.key'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot execute commands referencing secrets or sensitive files.' >&2; exit 1; fi
ARGS="$TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$ARGS" | grep -qE 'cr\.execute|cursor\.execute|psycopg2'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Raw SQL detected. Use Odoo ORM only — never raw SQL.' >&2; exit 1; fi

FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path"\s*:\s*"\K[^"]+'); case "$FILE" in */.env|*/.env.*) echo 'BLOCKED: .env files contain secrets. Never modify via Claude Code.' >&2; exit 1;; */ir.model.access.csv) echo 'WARNING: Modifying access control. Verify business_id record rules exist for all models.' >&2;; esac
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'cr\.execute|cursor\.execute|psycopg2|import psycopg'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Raw SQL detected in edit. Use Odoo ORM only.' >&2; exit 1; fi
FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path"\s*:\s*"\K[^"]+'); case "$FILE" in */.env|*/.env.*) echo 'BLOCKED: .env files contain secrets. Never create via Claude Code.' >&2; exit 1;; esac
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'cr\.execute|cursor\.execute|psycopg2|import psycopg'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Raw SQL detected in new file. Use Odoo ORM only.' >&2; exit 1; fi
FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path"\s*:\s*"\K[^"]+'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then echo "[post-edit] Python file modified: $FILE — run 'ruff check' before committing"; fi

FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path"\s*:\s*"\K[^"]+'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'models/.*\.py$'; then echo "[reminder] If you added a new model, ensure security/ir.model.access.csv and record rules exist."; fi

echo '=== Halo v2 Session ===' && echo "Root: $(pwd)" && echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'N/A')" && echo "Stack: Odoo CE 18 + PostgreSQL + Redis + Ollama + Stripe" && echo "Key docs: documents/Halo v2/ (requirements, architecture, software_development, automated_development)" && echo "Linter: ruff check addons/" && echo "Tests: docker compose exec odoo odoo -d halo_test -i MODULE --test-enable --stop-after-init" && echo "CRITICAL: Never raw SQL. Never commit secrets. Never skip security rules."
